name: kavio
description: JSON-first programmable video engine for automation, AI templates, and future visual editing.

scripts.install:render-binaries: corepack pnpm run install:render-ffmpeg && corepack pnpm run install:render-browsers
scripts.pack:dry: corepack pnpm run build && corepack pnpm run verify:render-optional-deps && corepack pnpm -r --filter './packages/*' pack --dry-run
scripts.release:check: corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm run pack:dry
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @kavio/schema test && corepack pnpm --filter @kavio/core test && corepack pnpm --filter @kavio/browser-renderer test && corepack pnpm --filter @kavio/render-worker test && corepack pnpm --filter @kavio/ffmpeg test && corepack pnpm --filter @kavio/render test && corepack pnpm --filter @kavio/builder test && corepack pnpm --filter @kavio/cli test && corepack pnpm --filter @kavio/mcp test && corepack pnpm --filter @kavio/example-basic-builder run build && corepack pnpm --filter @kavio/example-basic-builder run emit > /tmp/kavio-basic-builder.json && diff -u examples/basic-json/composition.json /tmp/kavio-basic-builder.json && corepack pnpm --filter @kavio/example-mvp-demo run build && corepack pnpm --filter @kavio/example-mvp-demo run validate
